belier.intro: The sky is a dark, velvet page tonight with the New Moon in communicative Gemini. For you, this celestial silence is not an emptiness but a fertile ground for new ideas and conversations. This is a moment to plant a single, potent seed-a new thought, a fresh perspective-that will shape your coming cycle.
belier.love: Words are your bridge to another's heart today. Instead of grand gestures, build intimacy through a shared story or a question that shows you truly see them. Listen as much as you speak; the space between words holds its own magic.
belier.work: Your mind is a forge, and ideas are the sparks flying from the anvil. Capture one of these sparks and give it form-draft the email, outline the project, make the call. The power of this New Moon lies in the first small, decisive act of communication.
belier.energy: Your usual fire may feel more like a pilot light, conserving its fuel for mental sprints. Honor this inward turn; your vitality is being channeled into thought and strategy rather than pure action.
belier.intuition: In the quiet of the moonless night, your inner voice speaks with startling clarity. Pay attention to the ideas that arrive unbidden, as they are whispers from your deepest self about your place in the world.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The New Moon in Gemini plants a seed in the fertile soil of your resources. This is a quiet, internal moment to redefine what wealth means to you, shifting from what you own to the value of your ideas. The sky is dark, a blank page on which you can write a new story about your self-worth.
taureau.love: Your ruler Venus whispers through the Gemini breeze, urging you to communicate your values. It's a day to find richness not in grand gestures, but in a conversation that clarifies what you both hold dear. True intimacy is built on this shared understanding.
taureau.work: This is a time for brainstorming, not for breaking ground on a new venture. The quick-witted Gemini energy brings fresh perspectives on your income and talents. Draft a new budget or business idea, letting your mind explore possibilities before your hands get to work.
taureau.energy: Your typically grounded energy might feel more mental and restless today. Instead of pushing through, honor this introspective phase by tending to your immediate environment in a simple, mindful way.
taureau.intuition: Your intuition speaks in fleeting thoughts and sudden insights about your security. Trust the quiet whisper that tells you what is truly valuable beyond any price tag, for as Hermes Trismegistus said, 'That which is Below corresponds to that which is Above'.
taureau.mantra: My worth grows from the seeds I plant today.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: Today, the cosmos offers you a blank page. A rare New Moon joins the Sun in your own sign, Gemini, opening a potent portal for beginnings. This is your personal new year, a moment to plant the seeds of who you wish to become in the fertile soil of your mind.
gemeaux.love: Words are bridges, especially now. Whether single or partnered, a new cycle of communication begins. Express a desire you've held in silence, or listen with a fresh heart- the conversation you have today can redefine the landscape of your connections.
gemeaux.work: Your mind is a whirlwind of potential, and this New Moon is the perfect time to launch a new idea. Draft the proposal, send the introductory email, or simply outline the project that has been calling to you. What you begin in thought today has the power to manifest.
gemeaux.energy: The New Moon's light is internal, so your physical energy may feel more suited to reflection than a marathon. Honor this quietude. Your vitality is flowing into your mental and spiritual realms, fueling dreams rather than sprints.
gemeaux.intuition: Your intuition speaks in the subtle language of fresh thoughts and sudden insights. With Pluto retrograde in a fellow air sign, these whispers carry transformative weight. Trust the new perspective that emerges from the quiet- it is a message from your deepest self.
gemeaux.mantra: My words are the seeds of my future.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The New Moon in Gemini arrives like a whisper in the most secluded chamber of your soul, your ruling planet cloaked in darkness. This is not a time for loud declarations but for planting a secret seed of intention in the fertile ground of your inner world. A new cycle begins within, a quiet turning of a page only you can see.
cancer.love: Conversations of the heart now take place in the realm of dreams and quiet reflection. The most profound intimacy today is the one you build with your own spirit, understanding unspoken needs. Listen to the feelings that surface when you are alone, for they hold the truest answers.
cancer.work: Your most effective work is done away from the bustling crowd, in the quiet sanctuary of your own thoughts. Focus on tying up loose ends and clearing the decks for what is to come, preparing the field before the planting. True progress is measured not in noise but in the silent completion of a cycle.
cancer.energy: Your energy is like a deep, still well today, drawing inward for profound renewal. Honor the need for rest and solitude, as this is how you gather the subtle strength required for the lunar month ahead.
cancer.intuition: The veil between worlds is thin, and messages from your subconscious are flowing freely. Keep a journal close, for your dreams are speaking a language your waking mind is finally ready to understand.
cancer.mantra: I plant the seeds of my future in silence.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The sky is a dark, fertile field tonight, with a New Moon in Gemini planting a seed in your social garden. Your ruler, the Sun, stands beside it, lending its warmth to new friendships and future dreams. This is a moment to set intentions not for the spotlight, but for the brilliant network of lights you belong to.
lion.love: Love today feels like a brilliant conversation that could go on forever. A bond might deepen not through grand gestures, but through shared ideas and laughter with friends. With Pluto stirring the depths of your partnerships, be aware that simple words can carry profound transformative weight.
lion.work: Your greatest professional asset today is your network. A new idea, born in the dark of the New Moon, will grow best when nurtured by teamwork and shared aspirations. Your creative fire burns brightest when it warms a circle of collaborators, so share your vision.
lion.energy: Your vitality flows more through your mind than your muscles. The New Moon invites a quiet reset, so honor the impulse to connect intellectually rather than pushing yourself physically.
lion.intuition: Listen closely to the quiet space between thoughts, for that is where your inner knowing resides. A message about your future path may arrive not as a lightning bolt, but as a feather on the wind of a casual chat.
lion.mantra: I plant seeds of connection for my future.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The sky is a dark, fertile field tonight, as the New Moon plants a seed of pure potential in Gemini, your house of career and public life. As a child of Mercury, you feel this cerebral current deeply; it’s an invitation to rewrite the script of your professional story and begin a new chapter under a silent sky.
vierge.love: In the quiet of this new lunar cycle, conversations become the soil where connection grows. It's a time to articulate your needs with gentle precision and listen with a fresh ear, planting seeds of understanding that will blossom in the coming weeks.
vierge.work: This is the moment to plant the acorn that will grow into your career's great oak. Set clear, precise intentions for your professional path, whether launching a project or refining your public image. Your words carry the weight of creation; use them to build the reputation you desire.
vierge.energy: Your energy may feel more internal than external, like a coiled spring of thought waiting for the right moment. Honor this quiet phase, for as Lao Tzu said, 'Muddy water is best cleared by leaving it alone.' Rest the body to let the mind chart its new course.
vierge.intuition: Intuition speaks not in thunder, but in the quiet click of understanding, like tumblers falling into place. In the moonless dark, your inner voice is exceptionally clear, offering insights into your true calling and the structure of your destiny.
vierge.mantra: I speak my professional future into being.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The sky is a dark, quiet mirror, holding a New Moon in your fellow air sign, Gemini. This is not an empty darkness, but a fertile one, where the seeds of new ideas and perspectives are being planted in the rich soil of your mind. A harmonious wind blows from this cosmic alignment, inviting you to begin a new chapter related to learning and communication.
balance.love: Relationships breathe the same air as you do, and today that air is fresh and full of new promise. A conversation started now, no matter how small, can open up entirely new landscapes of understanding between you and another. It is through the beauty of words and shared thoughts that connection deepens.
balance.work: This is a perfect moment to launch an idea that relies on your voice or your intellect. That proposal, that email, that conversation you've been planning- release it now like a paper lantern into the night. Trust that its message will find the right currents and travel exactly where it needs to go.
balance.energy: Your vitality is more mental than physical today, a quiet hum of intellectual curiosity. Don't force intense activity; instead, feed your energy with a stimulating discussion or by getting lost in a book.
balance.intuition: In the moonless quiet, your intuition speaks with the clarity of a single bell ringing in the distance. A sudden, clear thought will arrive not from emotion, but from a place of pure insight, connecting disparate pieces of your world.
balance.mantra: I speak my new chapter into being.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The sky is dark under the New Moon in Gemini, a quiet canvas that mirrors your own inner depths. This is a potent moment for you, Scorpio, as the Sun and Moon unite to plant a seed in the realm of shared resources and intimacy. With your ruler Pluto retrograde, this isn't just a new beginning, but a profound recalibration of your personal power from the inside out.
scorpion.love: Words become the vessels for your deep emotions today. Instead of letting feelings simmer in silence, the Gemini influence encourages you to articulate your needs and desires with clarity. This is a chance to start a new chapter in communication with a partner, building a bridge of understanding.
scorpion.work: A seed of intention planted now can reshape your collaborations and long-term financial strategies. This isn't a time for bold action, but for quiet planning and laying the groundwork for a future venture. Review contracts and conversations- the devil, and the divine, are in the details.
scorpion.energy: The New Moon energy can feel like a sacred void, inviting you to retreat and recharge. Your vital energy is turned inward, so honor the need for rest over exertion. Mental chatter may be high, but your strength lies in stilling your mind and listening to your body's wisdom.
scorpion.intuition: Your intuition speaks not in visceral feelings, but in whispers, words, and sudden insights. Pay attention to the signs in conversations and the ideas that emerge from the quiet. In the dark of the moon, your inner vision is sharpest, revealing the next step on your transformative path.
scorpion.mantra: In the quiet, I plant a seed of powerful intention.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: A potent New Moon in Gemini, your opposite sign, opens a fresh page in the book of your relationships. With both the Sun and Moon aligned here, the cosmos offers a quiet, fertile darkness to plant new seeds in your most significant partnerships. This is not a time for grand gestures, but for the silent understanding that precedes a new chapter.
sagittaire.love: The conversation you've been needing to have can now begin from a place of clarity and potential. Whether you're redefining terms with a current partner or setting intentions for a future one, use this moment's stillness to listen as much as you speak. A new kind of connection, based on shared ideas, is waiting to be born.
sagittaire.work: Collaborations and contracts are under this same potent lunar gaze. A new professional partnership could be initiated, or an existing one can be renewed with a fresh perspective. Your success today lies not in bold action but in carefully chosen words that lay the foundation for mutual growth.
sagittaire.energy: Your usual fiery energy may feel more like a pilot light than a bonfire today. This New Moon invites you to conserve your vitality and turn inward, allowing your mind to rest and recharge before the next cycle begins.
sagittaire.intuition: With Pluto subtly reshaping your inner world, your intuition speaks in the quiet spaces between words. Pay attention to what is not being said in your connections, for that is where the deepest truth currently resides.
sagittaire.mantra: I begin a new conversation with you.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The sky is dark with a New Moon in Gemini, a whisper of air in the earth of your daily life. This is not a day for grand pronouncements, but for planting a small, intelligent seed- a new habit, a fresh system for your work, or a different way of speaking your mind. A quiet beginning holds the greatest power now, inviting a cycle of renewal in your routines.
capricorne.love: Words build bridges or walls, and today you can choose your materials with care. A simple, honest conversation clears the air, creating space for a new understanding to grow. If you are seeking connection, set an intention for a partnership built on intellectual curiosity and shared daily rhythms.
capricorne.work: This Gemini New Moon falls directly in your house of work and service, asking you to innovate your methods. Forget the ten-year plan for a moment and focus on one clever adjustment that could make your day more efficient or enjoyable. The most profound changes often begin with the smallest, most practical shifts.
capricorne.energy: The quick, mental energy of Gemini can feel scattered to your grounded nature, so give it a clear channel. A brisk walk while organizing your thoughts or tidying your desk will help harmonize mind and body. Don't push for endurance; aim for intelligent, focused bursts of activity.
capricorne.intuition: Your intuition speaks today through clever ideas and sudden solutions to practical problems. Trust the spark of insight that simplifies a complex task; it is your inner wisdom finding the most elegant path. As Lao Tzu noted, 'The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.'
capricorne.mantra: I plant seeds of clarity in my daily life.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The sky offers you a blank page with this New Moon in fellow air sign Gemini. As the Sun and Moon unite, they spark a flurry of new ideas and creative impulses that feel like your native language. With Pluto retrograde in your own sign, this is not just a fresh start, but a profound recalibration of your self-expression.
verseau.love: Words are the seeds you plant in your relationships today. Whether single or partnered, a new conversation can open a new world, one based on intellectual connection and playful curiosity. State your intention clearly-the universe is listening for the sound of your truth.
verseau.work: This is a fertile moment for launching a project, especially one that relies on your unique voice, writing, or communication skills. Don't wait for the grand plan to be perfect; plant the first seed of an idea and trust its genius. Your mind is your greatest asset, and today it is incandescent.
verseau.energy: Your mental energy is buzzing like a beehive, but your physical reserves may be low under the dark moon. Avoid scattering your focus and instead, pour your attention into one or two inspiring thoughts. Gentle movement that clears the head is more beneficial than a strenuous workout.
verseau.intuition: In the quiet of the New Moon, intuition speaks in flashes of brilliance and sudden, clear insights. An idea may arrive fully formed, a gift from your higher self. Trust these intellectual sparks as they are guiding your deep, ongoing transformation.
verseau.mantra: I speak my creative truth into being.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: A New Moon in Gemini darkens the sky, planting a seed of beginning in your fourth house of home and emotional foundations. This is a quiet, internal reset, a time to reconsider what 'sanctuary' truly means to you. Like a river finding a new course, your emotional life seeks a fresh channel for expression.
poissons.love: Love today is not found in grand declarations, but in the silent comfort of a shared space. It's about building a nest, emotionally and physically, where you feel truly safe and seen. If you are seeking connection, first tend to the home within your own heart.
poissons.work: Your professional ambitions may feel distant as your focus turns inward to your foundations. The most important work you can do today is to ensure the ground beneath your feet is solid. A strong career is built upon a well-tended private life, not in spite of it.
poissons.energy: The dark moon pulls your energy inward and downward, urging you toward rest and retreat. Do not fight this current; allow yourself to be still and gather strength in the quiet. Your vitality is like a seed in the dark earth, preparing for its future growth.
poissons.intuition: With Pluto stirring the deep waters of your subconscious, this New Moon opens a powerful portal to your inner knowing. Your dreams and gut feelings are your most reliable oracles. Listen closely to the whispers that arise from the stillness within.
poissons.mantra: My inner sanctuary is my greatest strength.
poissons.author: Sibylle
